---
title: "Learning OpenTelemetry"
description: "My notes & review of [Learning OpenTelemetry](https://a.co/d/05i77pbK) by Ted Young & Austin Parker" 
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-04-04"
image: "./cover.jpg"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/learning-otel"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Technical Books, In Progress]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes
